title: All Purpose Forest Green 400ML - Professional Gloss Finish Spray Wood Color Paint
features: Apply to wood, metal, plastic and more
Quick drying and effective for interior and exterior application
Leaves a fantastic finish on most surfaces
description: Quick Drying Suitable For Indoor And Outdoor Use Excellent Coverage And Adhesion Simple And Quick Spraying Operation That Helps Minimize The Loss Of Paint Quick Drying, Bright Cooler With Fur Looks Smooth And Supple Again For A Better Finish, We Recommend Using A Spray Trigger From Our Shop All Spray Cans Are Ideal For Vehicle And Almost All Surfaces That Are Clean And Free Of Oil Good Results Are Easily Achievable With These Easy To Use Spray Paint Cans Each Can Contains 400 Ml We Can Only Send 1 Can Per Order To Outside The Uk Mainland, Due To Restrictions On Maximum Content 500Ml.
